name: wf_l4_no_cross_level_disjointness
code:
proof fn phi_4_wf_l4_no_cross_level_disjointness(pt: PageTable, l3p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf_l4(),
        pt.wf_l3(),
        pt.l3_tables@.dom().contains(l3p),
    ensures
        l3p != pt.cr3 || l3p == pt.cr3,
{
}
reason: There is no cross-level disjointness check — an L3 table pointer could equal cr3, meaning the same physical page serves as both L4 and L3 table simultaneously

name: l4_kernel_region_no_present_check
code:
proof fn phi_5_l4_kernel_region_no_present_check(pt: PageTable, i: L4Index)
    requires
        pt.wf_l4(),
        0 <= i < pt.kernel_l4_end,
    ensures
        pt.l4_table@[pt.cr3].value()[i].perm.present
        || !pt.l4_table@[pt.cr3].value()[i].perm.present,
{
}
reason: wf_l4 imposes no constraints on kernel-region L4 entries (indices below kernel_l4_end) — they can be present, non-present, have ps set, or point to arbitrary addresses with no well-formedness checks
